creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
this is the cutest experience exploring Macao with POP MART characters like Baby Molly, CRYBABY, DIMOO, and LABUBU I ever had!!! ✨🇲🇴💕🌼🏘️✨

📍It’s their first time popping up at Macao’s World Heritage Sites & it made the whole city feel extra fun and playful. I loved stumbling across them in different spots; every corner had something new to discover. 

📍There were also fun stamp collections, lucky draws & even chances to grab limited POP MART goodies. Between the historic sights, the food & all the photo moments, it was such an exciting & memorable way to see the city. Definitely recommend if you’re a fan! 🥳 

#Macao
#FollowMeToMacao
#ExperienceMacao
#POPMARTMACAOCITYWALK
@visitmacao 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh

transcription.text: Wait, who my ladies runnin'? Wait, who my ladies runnin'? Wait, who my ladies runnin'? Dochi! Gimme chi, gimme purr, gimme meow, gimme hurr, gimme funds, gimme rights, gimme fight, gimme nerve, gimme cunt, lemme serve Lemme, lemme out, lemme in, knockin' doors down, got the keys to the Benz In the boardroom, lookin' bored, cause I'm not here for pleasin' the men, not here to reason with them Misbehaved, mispushed my pen, I can't tame my passion for him Can't keep up, what happened to them? Who you laughin' to, men? Comfort is routine, bossin' a new team, this ain't a new thing, no, sir Money on stoopid, hopped in a new whip, you still on my own work Work, work, this might hurt, I sweat hard, wet t-shirt, extra large, ain't scared of the dirt Hit that jackpot, now I'm ridin' Rollin', rollin', rollin', rollin', rollin'
